calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Request For Default Court Judgment Against Defendant By Court
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph J. Carson, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Gena Eales, CSR 176.

Anna Liu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 2675 GEARY BOULEVARD, LP,
No appearance by defaulted defendant ALEXANDER VILDERMAN DBA CITY DENTAL,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-X dismissed without prejudice.

Witness: Sharlene Hassler sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $93,388.11
Pre-Judgment Interest: $4,769.40
Attorney's Fees: $13,915.00
Costs: $1,033.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $115,105.51

Judgment signed in open court.
